name: Schala's Chamber
description: A serene private chamber in the eastern wing of Zeal Palace, belonging to Princess Schala. The room is modest compared to the opulence of the rest of the palace, with soft blue curtains and a large window overlooking the clouds below. Bookshelves line one wall, filled with ancient tomes on magic and philosophy. A small meditation alcove sits in the corner, and a pendant rests on a table near the bed—a gift from her brother Janus. The room emanates a gentle, calming magical aura.
